imsmd:description.imsmd:langstring: Explore information about an environmental scientist. Learn about their life and work. Find out why they enjoy their area of research. Choose statements that match their biographical profile. This learning object is one in a series of nine objects. Some objects in the series are also packaged as combined learning objects.

imsmd:centity.imsmd:vcard: BEGIN:VCARD REV:2006-07-25T14:08:50+09:30 ADR:;;;Collingwood;VIC;3066;Australia ORG:CSIRO Publishing URL:http://www.publish.csiro.au/ VERSION:3.0 END:VCARD
BEGIN:VCARD REV:2007-02-23T06:35:47Z ADR:;;;Melbourne;VIC;3000;Australia ORG:Curriculum Corporation\; The Le@rning Federation URL:http://www.thelearningfederation.edu.au/ VERSION:3.0 END:VCARD

tlf:remark.tlf:langstring: v.3.0 Updated metadata. v.2.0 File size reduced to improve load times. Includes updated educational metadata. Added support for Gecko-based browsers and seamless tabbing. v.1.0 First public release.

imsmd:otherplatformrequirements.imsmd:langstring: Initial load time may exceed 10 seconds on a dedicated 64kbps connection due to the use of rich media content. Load time on some screens may exceed 10 seconds on a dedicated 64kbps connection due to the use of rich media content.

tlf:keylearningobjective.tlf:langstring: Students explore biographical information about everyday scientists, including their professional activities and personal interests.
Students explore the diversity of scientific activities.
Students compile a biographical summary about an everyday scientist, using information presented in a range of media types.

tlf:educationalvalue.tlf:langstring: Illustrates how scientists live and work.
Provides biographical information about a scientist, their professional activities and personal interests.
Includes interview transcripts, sound clips, photos and videos.

tlf:rights.tlf:langstring: © Curriculum Corporation. This material solely contains TLF Content. Refer to Conditions of Use.

item.title: Start: Meet a scientist: environmental scientist
